testcase.name: test_legacy_initiate_still_works
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_awakening_chat.py:226: in test_legacy_initiate_still_works assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"System awakening failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 1.421607, Max budget: 1.4"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
